changeSet.author: Damir Seferberkov
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE ma_roles_db ( id UUID NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, description TEXT NOT NULL, created_by TEXT NOT NULL, created_date TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, modified_by TEXT NOT NULL, modified_date TIMESTAMP NOT NULL );

changeSet.author: Damir Seferberkov
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE ma_users_db ( id UUID NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, first_name TEXT NOT NULL, last_name TEXT NOT NULL, birth_date DATE NOT NULL, gender TEXT NOT NULL, role_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES ma_roles_db (id), email TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, password_hash TEXT NOT NULL, created_by TEXT NOT NULL, created_date TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, modified_by TEXT NOT NULL, modified_date TIMESTAMP NOT NULL );

changeSet.author: Damir Seferberkov
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO ma_roles_db VALUES (uuid_generated_v4(), 'ADMIN', 'Роль администратора', 'system', now(), 'system', now()); INSERT INTO ma_roles_db VALUES (uuid_generated_v4(), 'USER', 'Роль пользователя', 'system', now(), 'system', now());
changeSet.rollback: DELETE FROM ma_roles_db WHERE name = 'ADMIN'; DELETE FROM ma_roles_db WHERE name = 'USER';
